data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: All tests GREEN. Created red-test-writer.yaml with strong keywords (create-test, modify-existing-test, behavioral test, failing test, RED test, red-test-writer), moderate keywords (test_approach, assert on output, exit code, side effects), negative keywords (fix:, bug:, refactor, migration), base_priority=5, min_score=3. Also fixed pre-existing backward compat failure: test-automator.yaml needed 'unit tests' and 'add unit tests' strong keywords to score 6 and beat debugger's score of 4 for the generic test task. Added RED routing scenarios to test-cases.yaml. Removed RED marker from .test-index. Final result: bash tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh → 19 passed, 0 failed.
